  1. Playbooks

USIS Playbooks

Reusable checklists with assignable steps; start a run per contract, change order, or other workflow (Plan 22).

Prev|Index|Run detail

Plan references: Plan 22 (Operational playbooks), Plan 20 — Site map. Optional API actor: set localStorage key usisActorUserId to your user UUID for non-dev servers.

Templates

Admin/superuser: create templates. Everyone else: start runs from active templates.

Template detail
Select a template or create a new one.
Steps

Order is top to bottom. Default assignee is copied onto each new run (optional).

#TitleInstructionsDefault assignee
Recent runs

Open runs you created or are assigned to. Uses mine=1 and open_only=1 by default.

TitleStatusProgress
Start checklist run
